requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz / 220–380 V Supply and China GB/T 18487 Evidence for Uzbekistan
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦50Hz/220–380V供电与中国GB/T 18487证据
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦50Hz/220–380V供電與中國GB/T 18487證據

summary.en: Uzbekistan uses 220/380 V, 50 Hz power systems, consistent with the CIS grid standard. Chinese EV chargers designed for China are usually frequency-compatible at a basic rating level, as China also uses 50 Hz. The remaining issues are not frequency alone but site voltage tolerance, phase configuration, earthing system (TN-C, TN-S, or TT), power quality, thermal rating, hot-climate operation (Uzbekistan has hot summers), surge environment, and local protection coordination. Chargers must still pass O'zstandart conformity assessment regardless of frequency compatibility.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦采用220/380V、50Hz电力系统，与独联体电网标准一致。面向中国设计的充电设备在基础频率额定值上通常兼容，因为中国同样使用50Hz。剩余问题不仅是频率，还包括站点电压容差、相数配置、接地系统（TN-C、TN-S或TT）、电能质量、热额定值、高温气候运行（乌兹别克斯坦夏季炎热）、浪涌环境和本地保护配合。无论频率是否兼容，充电设备仍须通过O'zstandart合格评定。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦採用220/380V、50Hz電力系統，與獨聯體電網標準一致。面向中國設計的充電設備在基礎頻率額定值上通常相容，因為中國同樣使用50Hz。剩餘問題不僅是頻率，還包括站點電壓容差、相數配置、接地系統（TN-C、TN-S或TT）、電能品質、熱額定值、高溫氣候運行（烏茲別克斯坦夏季炎熱）、浪湧環境和本地保護配合。無論頻率是否相容，充電設備仍須通過O'zstandart合格評定。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan electricity supply and grid connection technical conditions (220/380 V, 50 Hz)
IEC 61851 series where specified by O'zstandart or project
Applicable GOST / O'z DSt electrical installation and power-quality requirements
Project-specific hot-climate, enclosure, and environmental specifications

summary.en: China GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence typically supports 50 Hz operation and charger control behavior. GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, and GB/T 20234.3-2023 connector evidence and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication evidence may also be included, but connector hardware must be changed to IEC 62196 for Uzbekistan. Chinese test reports must be mapped to Uzbekistan site conditions and any IEC 61851 / O'zstandart requirements.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 18487.1-2023证据通常支持50Hz运行和充电控制行为。也可能包括GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015和GB/T 20234.3-2023连接器证据以及GB/T 27930-2023直流通信证据，但连接器硬件必须为乌兹别克斯坦更换为IEC 62196。中国测试报告必须映射到乌兹别克斯坦站点条件以及任何IEC 61851/O'zstandart要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 18487.1-2023證據通常支持50Hz運行和充電控制行為。也可能包括GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015和GB/T 20234.3-2023連接器證據以及GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊證據，但連接器硬體必須為烏茲別克斯坦更換為IEC 62196。中國測試報告必須映射到烏茲別克斯坦站點條件以及任何IEC 61851/O'zstandart要求。

standards_or_laws: China charger environmental and power-quality test reports

gap.en: Document 50 Hz nameplate suitability, accepted input-voltage range (220/380 V ±tolerance), three-phase and single-phase variants, neutral and earthing assumptions, derating curves for hot climate, cooling behavior and ambient temperature rating, IP / IK ratings, surge protection, residual-current protection, and any high-temperature startup or thermal-protection behavior specific to Uzbekistan operating conditions.
gap.zh: 应记录50Hz铭牌适用性、允许输入电压范围（220/380V ±容差）、三相和单相变体、中性线和接地假设、高温气候下的降额曲线、冷却行为和环境温度额定值、IP/IK等级、浪涌保护、剩余电流保护，以及针对乌兹别克斯坦运行条件的高温启动或热保护行为。
gap.zht: 應記錄50Hz銘牌適用性、允許輸入電壓範圍（220/380V ±容差）、三相和單相變體、中性線和接地假設、高溫氣候下的降額曲線、冷卻行為和環境溫度額定值、IP/IK等級、浪湧保護、剩餘電流保護，以及針對烏茲別克斯坦運行條件的高溫啟動或熱保護行為。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by site technical conditions, utility approval, electrical installation rules, tender, or project specification; O'zstandart conformity assessment is also required regardless of frequency compatibility
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese product safety, GB/T charger scope, and customer requirements

source.publisher: Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Shared 50 Hz frequency reduces one compatibility risk, but it does not close Uzbekistan voltage, earthing, power-quality, environmental, connector, O'zstandart conformity, or grid-approval gaps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 同为50Hz可降低一个兼容性风险，但不能覆盖乌兹别克斯坦电压、接地、电能质量、环境、连接器、O'zstandart合格评定或电网批准差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 同為50Hz可降低一個相容性風險，但不能覆蓋烏茲別克斯坦電壓、接地、電能品質、環境、連接器、O'zstandart合格評定或電網批准差距。
